content:
<action>
<tool>graph.plan</tool>
<objective>Complete the owner task of creating a long novel with detailed settings.</objective>
<steps>
1. Verify the current state of the novel project.
2. Continue with the plan: define genre, tone, and themes (already partially done in settings.md).
3. Develop character dossiers (partially done in characters.md).
4. Outline plot structure.
5. Establish chapter breakdown.
6. Draft first chapter.
</steps>
<reason>The agent is in recovery mode after repeated action refusals. A new plan is required to resume the owner's task of creating a novel.</reason>
<checks>dispatch accepts semantic plan</checks>
<paths>stories/novel</paths>
</action>
